profile.name: Syamil Asyraf Bin Mohd Ali Jaafar
profile.headline: Software engineering student at Universiti Malaya building practical apps, browser games, simulations, and clear digital interfaces.
profile.summary: My portfolio starts with software engineering: structured products, maintainable code, user flows, and testing. Around that core, I explore games, simulations, visuals, and multimedia work as supporting strengths.
